_comment_time_intervals: Use 300 for PEMS datasets (288 time slots/day). Use 1800 for datasets with 48 time slots/day (e.g., bike/taxi).
_comment_llm_layer: Number of GPT-2 transformer layers. Default is 6 from paper.
_comment_pfa_U: Number of unfrozen attention layers in Parameter-Frozen Attention (PFA). Default is 1 from paper.
_comment_gpt_channel: GPT-2 hidden dimension/channel size. Default is 256 from paper.
_comment_lr_schedule: Learning rate decays to 10% at epochs 100 and 200 as per paper settings.
